title: Prevail
lyrics: Oh We do that right now I think so it's like I want to prevail right now I want to dream right now I Spent too many nights spent too many darkness thinking about how I can't get the right way But there's no right way per se just a tone inside your brain Vibrations of the things you want How you far have you gone to make that a reality cuz you got what? Connect with everything you come across Be the spark be the ground be the humming come around and have everyone coming from the one That's how you get past the darkness of the light and the one prevail in your heart first prevail with your star Explode Yeah, no matter what the dark road has a hold you yeah, you're gonna breathe You're gonna fight the one that you wanted to heal from you're gonna breathe In your nightmare Oh Not alone we fight together together together Is that what they say when you come together and you have a family per se? And who's the one to judge what that means to you? It's just a word that we agree on man It sounds different in different languages. It's like hello. Hola. Hi. Goodbye. No way that I say that This is the reason why I'm telling you my life will be alright. I just roll with the weather know that what I do is good No matter which way the water wanna do it Cuz I know my brain is the one that has the ultimate judge over me So I uplift myself with self-love I do tell myself feel it all Through that night, baby. Yeah, you'll see that. Yeah, we will prevail Through all the dark nights, no matter what we fight we will prevail Then there's hell we climb up to by the start we're all heartless I know it gets lost In the shovel in the fight that you fight you fight yourself Lost in the shovel you hide. I Wish I could be better. I do I do a man I wish I could not be tied to one thought and one view and embrace it all but Fortunately, I know beyond it we prevail We prevail through this hell Oh Don't you come down with me Prevail in the hell to the dimes Prevail in the hell to the crimes Prevail in the hell to the crimes Prevail in the hell to the people that made us fight each other for their wicked power designs We will prevail You
